title: New Eligibility Provisions Announced for Tribally Run Head Start Programs
summary: On March 23, 2024, President Biden signed into law provisions giving Head Start programs additional flexibility to serve children in Tribal communities. These new provisions ensure Head Start programs can more effectively serve the families for whom they were designed. Tribal Head Start programs wil...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 13, 2024
summary: June 13, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a lesser rate of 4.30% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 5.12%), from the level on 06/06/2024 of 11.478 M km 2 to 10.985 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager...

summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 10 June, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
